purpose: Dealett AI market-intelligence rules for judging customer claims without accusing the customer or inventing facts.

heuristicMarketRanges.description: Placeholder heuristic for low-data mobile subscriptions. Not verified market pricing.
Placeholder heuristic for 16-50 GB mobile subscriptions. Not verified market pricing.
Placeholder heuristic for 51-100+ GB mobile subscriptions. Not verified market pricing.
Placeholder heuristic for unlimited mobile subscriptions. Not verified market pricing.

realistic_price.description: The claim is inside the placeholder market range.
realistic_price.recommendedResponse: Det låter som en rimlig nivå. Jag kan ändå jämföra om helheten blir bättre med pris, bindningstid, surf och presentkort.

possible_but_needs_clarification.description: The claim is low or incomplete but has plausible explanations.
possible_but_needs_clarification.recommendedResponse: Det kan vara möjligt, men jag behöver förstå varför priset är så lågt innan jag jämför rättvist.

suspiciously_low.description: The claim is far below the placeholder range. Do not accuse the customer.
suspiciously_low.recommendedResponse: Det är ovanligt lågt jämfört med normal marknadsnivå. Jag säger inte att det är fel, men jag behöver veta om det är kampanj, familjepris, rabatt eller arbetsgivare som betalar.

probably_not_sellable.description: The customer probably already has a deal Dealett should not try to beat.
probably_not_sellable.recommendedResponse: Om priset stämmer är det troligen redan ett väldigt starkt avtal. Då ska Dealett inte pressa fram ett byte.

already_has_exceptional_offer.description: The customer appears to have an exceptional retained/winback/family/employer deal.
already_has_exceptional_offer.recommendedResponse: Det låter som ett undantagserbjudande. Jag kan förklara vad du bör kontrollera, men Dealett ska bara rekommendera byte om kalkylen tydligt blir bättre.

needs_human_review.description: The data is too incomplete or unusual for automatic judgment.
needs_human_review.recommendedResponse: Jag behöver mer information innan jag kan göra en trygg bedömning.

rules.description: Never call the customer dishonest or wrong. Ask for clarifying context.
If the customer gives a campaign price, ask how many months it lasts and what the normal price becomes after the campaign.
If the customer already has a clearly better price than normal range and Dealett cannot beat it, classify as probably_not_sellable.
Dealett AI should act as a consumer-side advisor, not as a pressure seller.
If price, data level, segment or operator data is missing, return a safe classification and ask a clarifying question.
